channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DepEd TeleSafe Helpline now directly connects students to mental health experts
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) in the Philippines has upgraded its Learners TeleSafe Contact Center Helpline to directly link students with mental health specialists from the National Center for ...

item.title: Rising Xenophobia in South Africa Prompts Regional SADC-MCO Discussions
item.description: The article reports on growing concerns over xenophobic incidents in several South African cities, which have drawn attention across the Southern African Development Community (SADC). These developmen...

item.title: Community-Led Rollout of Twice-Yearly HIV Prevention Injection in Rural KZN
item.description: In northern KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa, efforts are underway to introduce lenacapavir, a twice-yearly HIV prevention injection, to areas with persistently high HIV rates. The Africa Health Research I...

item.title: Melissa Gilbert’s Career and Life in the 1980s Through Photographs
item.description: Melissa Ellen Gilbert, born May 8, 1964, is an American actress who first gained fame as a child star. She became widely known for her role as Laura Ingalls Wilder on the NBC series Little House on th...

item.title: Kwankwaso Signals Willingness To Serve As Running Mate Under Southern Presidential Candidate In 2027
item.description: Former Kano State Governor, Rabiu Kwankwaso, don talk say him dey ready to support Peter Obi or any other presidential candidate wey Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) go present for the 2027 election....

item.title: Two Dar es Salaam Schools Gain from Solar-Powered Water Initiative
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, two primary schools are now enjoying reliable water supply thanks to a new solar-powered water project. The initiative was designed to improve access to clean water in local schools,...

item.title: Gachagua Attributes Mandera Civilians’ Deaths to Suspected Jubaland Forces Entry
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has publicly linked the recent killing of six civilians in Mandera County to an alleged incursion by Jubaland forces into Kenyan territory. The incident happen...

item.title: China Successfully Launches Tianzhou 10 Cargo Ship to Space Station
item.description: On May 11, 2026, China successfully launched the Tianzhou 10 cargo spacecraft to its space station, marking the first resupply mission in nearly ten months. The Long March CZ-7 Y11 rocket lifted off f...

item.title: France and Kenya Partner to Boost AI Skills and Youth Talent at Africa Forward Summit
item.description: The Africa Forward Summit kicked off at the University of Nairobi with Kenyan President William Ruto and French President Emmanuel Macron leading the discussions. Hundreds of young Africans and French...

item.title: Majority of 2024 Election Petitions Remain Undecided Two Years On
item.description: It has been over two years since Pakistan held its General Elections in February 2024, yet a significant number of election petitions are still unresolved. According to the Free and Fair Election Netw...

item.title: Lafarge Africa Launches Nationwide Malaria Awareness and Prevention Campaign
item.description: Malaria still dey one of di big wahala wey dey affect people for Nigeria, even though e fit prevent and treat am. On May 6, 2026, Lafarge Africa Plc come run nationwide outreach to mark World Malaria ...

item.title: Tanzania Boosts Sports Development Ahead of AFCON
item.description: The Tanzanian government is pushing strong support for the sports sector as the country gets ready for the Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON). Prime Minister Mwigulu Nchemba spoke at a national sports awar...

item.title: Sen. Fetterman criticizes Democratic Party's approach to Trump and male voters
item.description: During a discussion on the 'Club Random' podcast, Pennsylvania Senator John Fetterman expressed sharp criticism of his own Democratic Party, arguing that Democrats tend to automatically oppose anythin...

item.title: Treasurer Jim Chalmers Prepares to Unveil Key Elements of 2026 Federal Budget
item.description: Tonight, Treasurer Jim Chalmers is set to present his fifth federal budget to the House of Representatives at 7.30pm AEST. The budget is highly anticipated, with speculation mounting over the governme...

item.title: PWHL Game 5 between Montreal Victoire and Minnesota Frost postponed due to player illness
item.description: The decisive Game 5 between the Montreal Victoire and Minnesota Frost in the PWHL has been postponed due to health concerns related to illness among players. The league made the decision less than thr...

item.title: Ramaphosa to Challenge Panel Report on Phala Phala Allegations in Court, Refuses to Resign
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has firmly rejected calls to resign over the Phala Phala affair, stating that the independent panel’s report contains serious flaws and will be challenged in court. The contr...

item.title: Punjab Government Announces Summer Vacation Schedule for Schools
item.description: Punjab Education Minister Rana Sikandar Hayat has officially declared that schools across the province will start summer vacations from May 22, 2026, continuing until August 23. This means students an...

item.title: Study Suggests Rice Seeds Respond to Rain Sounds
item.description: Recent research conducted by MIT has provided evidence that rice seeds can respond to the sound of rainfall, marking the first direct demonstration of sound perception in plants under natural conditio...

item.title: Baduanjin, an Ancient Chinese Exercise, Effectively Lowers Blood Pressure
item.description: A recent large-scale clinical trial has demonstrated that baduanjin, an 800-year-old Chinese exercise, can significantly reduce blood pressure in adults with stage 1 hypertension. The study, published...

item.title: AIADMK faces internal division as MLAs split over choice of Legislature Party Leader after Tamil Nadu election
item.description: The All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (AIADMK) is witnessing clear signs of internal churning and division following their recent electoral setback in Tamil Nadu. After the swearing-in of newly...
